reason: Already implemented in commits 6036bc4f (#3030) and 75904f19 (#3068). Title contains 'Drum Kit & Drum Set', description references Mastodon and specific gear (DW, Sabian AAX, Vater sticks). H2 sub-heading renders 'Brann Dailor Drum Kit, Gear & Setup' dynamically.
body:
## Context

L1 snapshot 2026-06-24: `brann dailor drum kit` — pos **6.3** / 23 impr / **0 clicks**. Brann Dailor is our **highest-volume CTR-gap entity** (23 impressions, 0 clicks, page 1). Pattern: the `gsc-watch-snapshot.md` Brann-Dailor-pattern classifier was named after exactly this signal. Entry in `.agents/seo/learned-patterns.md` (2026-06-27) flags this for immediate CTR fix if still 0 clicks at next L1 run — which it is.

Mastodon impressions are high because Mastodon is a highly searched band. We are on page 1 for their drummer but earning zero traffic. Title/meta fix is the fastest lever.

## Action

In `packages/frontend/data/drummers.js` (or equivalent profile data file), update the **brann-dailor** entry:

1. **SEO title** — include both `drum kit` and `drum set` variants, e.g.:  
   _"Brann Dailor Drum Kit & Gear Setup | MetalForge"_
2. **Meta description** — include Mastodon context + specific gear callouts, e.g.:  
   _"See exactly what drums, cymbals, and hardware Brann Dailor (Mastodon) uses — complete kit specs and signature gear."_
3. **H1 / page heading** — if not already: "Brann Dailor Drum Kit & Setup"

## Verify

1. `/drummer/brann-dailor` → `<title>` tag contains "drum kit" or "drum set"
2. `<meta name="description">` references Mastodon and specific gear
3. GSC: watch `brann dailor drum kit` in next L1 snapshot (2026-07-01); target ≥1 click

## Done

When `/drummer/brann-dailor` title and meta include gear-specific language and both drum kit/drum set keywords.
title: SEO: Optimize brann-dailor profile title+meta for 'drum kit' query cluster (pos 6.3 / 23 impr / 0 clicks)
